Name: More monsters
Comment: So at max 5 points - 15 instead of 10 monsters

Name: More bosses
What it does: Bosses spawn more frequently (naturally - once per 30 monsters)
Comment: So at max 5 points - every 20 monsters instead of every 30

Name: Uber bosses
What it does: Uber boss can spawn (once every 50 monsters, unaffected by other modifiers)

Name: More gold
What it does: More gold per kill (10% per point)

Name: More exp
What it does: More exp per kill (10% per point)

Name: Cooldown reset
What it does: All cooldowns are reset once in a while (1% chance after killing a monster)
Comment: After killing a monster there is a 1 in 100 chance that alll cooldowns will be reset
